summary: Comprehensive testing of Glowing Star Premium Beauty Contest Platform with 50+ professional contestants. All backend APIs pass (42/42 tests). Frontend features working: Homepage, Contestants page with search/filter, Leaderboard with filter tabs, Admin panel with login, Voting pages. Fixed route ordering bug for /contestants/highlights API and fixed seeded contestants' slug format.

issues: Stats show '12+' contestants instead of actual total (54) - this is because it shows displayed count, not total count

action_items: Consider updating homepage stats to show total contestant count from API instead of displayed count
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Moved /contestants/highlights route before /contestants/{contestant_id} to fix route ordering
/app/backend/tests/test_new_apis.py - Created comprehensive tests for new APIs
seed_data_creation: Fixed 50 seeded contestants' slugs to include 2026/ prefix for proper voting page routing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 54 contestants now have proper slug format (2026/contestant-name). Backend APIs tested: /api/search, /api/contestants/highlights, /api/leaderboard/filtered, /api/admin/analytics, /api/admin/fraud-analysis/{id}, /api/contest/timeline, /api/admin/contestants/{id}/badges. Admin credentials: admin@glowingstar.net / admin123

features_tested.homepage: PASS - Loads with contestants, stats, Vote Now button
features_tested.contestants_page: PASS - Shows all contestants with photos, search works, category filter works
features_tested.search_functionality: PASS - Search by name (Isabella) returns results
features_tested.category_filter: PASS - Filter by Fashion & Glamour category works
features_tested.leaderboard: PASS - Shows top contestants with vote counts, filter tabs (Global, Category, Daily) work
features_tested.admin_login: PASS - Login at /portal/login with admin@glowingstar.net / admin123
features_tested.admin_panel: PASS - Dashboard shows stats with 54 contestants, 2.5K votes
features_tested.fraud_analysis: PASS - API returns risk score, risk level, IP analysis, email analysis
features_tested.analytics: PASS - API returns total_page_views, total_votes, votes_by_type, traffic_sources
features_tested.badges_update: PASS - Admin can update is_verified and is_featured badges
features_tested.highlights_api: PASS - Returns trending, new, featured, verified, rising contestants
features_tested.contest_timeline: PASS - Returns round phases with status
features_tested.voting_page: PASS - Individual contestant pages load with vote button
features_tested.mobile_responsive: PASS - Homepage and contestants page display correctly on mobile

mocked_apis.Email OTP: MOCKED - Logs to console instead of sending actual emails
